overview.short: Peddintlamma Temple is a Hindu pilgrimage site.
overview.description: Peddintlamma Temple is a Hindu pilgrimage site. It is located on the shores of Kolleru Lake in Kolletikota of Eluru district in Andhra Pradesh.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Peddintlamma Temple, Kolletikota?
faq.a: The best time to visit Peddintlamma Temple, Kolletikota is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Peddintlamma Temple, Kolletikota?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Vijayawada Airport (54 km) and the nearest railway station is Vijayawada Junction (72 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Peddintlamma Temple, Kolletikota?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Peddintlamma Temple, Kolletikota at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Peddintlamma Temple, Kolletikota?
faq.a: Stays in Peddintlamma Temple, Kolletikota start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Peddintlamma Temple, Kolletikota?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kolletikota, Prathikollanka, Pallevada, Madivada, West Godavari, Bhujabalapatnam.
